name: ssh-lab
description: Remote server SSH workbench — check GPU status, run commands, tail logs, compare hosts, manage alerts across multiple servers

add.description: Add or update a server configuration

status.description: Show GPU, disk, and process status for a server or all servers

run.description: Execute a command on a remote server

ls.description: List a remote directory with sorting

df.description: Disk usage for one or all hosts

sync.description: rsync file transfer between local and remote

watch.description: Snapshot file state for polling (change detection)

compare.usage: ssh-lab compare <h1> <h2> [--probes gpu,disk,process] | ssh-lab compare all

doctor.description: Run connectivity and health diagnostics on a host

alert-add.description: Add an alert rule (gpu_idle, disk_full, process_died, etc.)

alert-remove.description: Remove an alert rule by id

alert-check.description: Evaluate alerts against live host status
